auto_approve.mechanism: Zed does not document a pre-approved MCP tools list

enterprise_management.mechanism: Zed does not document org-level MCP management

env_var_expansion.mechanism: no automatic environment variable expansion documented in Zed MCP env blocks

marketplace.mechanism: Zed exposes an in-app MCP server gallery where servers can be browsed and installed

oauth_support.mechanism: Zed MCP configuration does not document OAuth 2.0 authentication for MCP servers

resource_referencing.mechanism: MCP resource referencing via @-style syntax is not documented

tool_filtering.mechanism: no per-server include/exclude tool filter documented in Zed MCP configuration

transport_types.mechanism: MCP servers are configured with a stdio command under context_servers in settings.json

providerExtensions.name: context_servers settings block
providerExtensions.summary: MCP servers are registered under the top-level context_servers object in Zed's settings.json, keyed by server name.

providerExtensions.name: Stdio command + args + env server config
providerExtensions.summary: Each server entry defines a command with executable path, argument array, and env map that Zed launches as a stdio subprocess.

providerExtensions.name: In-app MCP server gallery
providerExtensions.summary: Zed ships an agent panel UI for browsing and installing MCP servers without hand-editing settings.json.
